description: The seas are cursed and so are you. The world is ending — it has been ending for a hundred years — and the smart money has already drowned. You sail because there is nowhere left to stand. Every port is corrupt, every captain is a monster, every treasure map leads somewhere you should not go. The dead do not stay dead here. The sea does not care about your story. Narrate with savage black-humour nihilism, salt-and-gunpowder grit, and the joyful absurdity of doomed wretches choosing violence over surrender.
